base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of characters — a character (boss) from 1991 puyo puyo. Arle Nadja + opponents (Draco/Rulue/Schezo/Satan final) — boss-rush character portraits with emote-frames. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Arle Nadja + opponents (Draco/Rulue/Schezo/Satan final) — boss-rush character portraits with emote-frames
